## Meeting Purpose

[Introduce new strategic lead and align on content priorities.](https://fathom.video/share/JgEvFPGox2oXU64H_ntRrdjPHBSidyc8?tab=summary&timestamp=176.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**New Strategic Lead:** Katya Luscomb (GrowthX) now leads strategy, freeing Jessalynn Jones for editorial work to boost production quality.](https://fathom.video/share/JgEvFPGox2oXU64H_ntRrdjPHBSidyc8?tab=summary&timestamp=176.0)
  - [**Strategic Messaging Blocked:** The pivotal strategic messaging document is stalled pending leadership review, delaying content alignment.](https://fathom.video/share/JgEvFPGox2oXU64H_ntRrdjPHBSidyc8?tab=summary&timestamp=685.0)
  - [**New Product Messaging Integration:** New product messaging is being integrated into blogs to build topical authority pre-launch; Sydnie Mulcahy (Flosum) will share enablement decks next week.](https://fathom.video/share/JgEvFPGox2oXU64H_ntRrdjPHBSidyc8?tab=summary&timestamp=758.0)
  - [**Meeting Time Shift:** The weekly sync will move 30 minutes later to 8:00 AM PT, pending final confirmation.](https://fathom.video/share/JgEvFPGox2oXU64H_ntRrdjPHBSidyc8?tab=summary&timestamp=1095.0)

## Topics

### Team & Role Introductions

  - [**Katya Luscomb (GrowthX):** New strategic lead for big-picture planning.](https://fathom.video/share/JgEvFPGox2oXU64H_ntRrdjPHBSidyc8?tab=summary&timestamp=176.0)
  - [**Jessalynn Jones (GrowthX):** Now focused on editorial work to maintain high production quality.](https://fathom.video/share/JgEvFPGox2oXU64H_ntRrdjPHBSidyc8?tab=summary&timestamp=176.0)
  - [**Sydnie Mulcahy (Flosum):** Director of Product Marketing; owns blog approvals, technical reviews, and product launch messaging.](https://fathom.video/share/JgEvFPGox2oXU64H_ntRrdjPHBSidyc8?tab=summary&timestamp=299.0)
  - [**Saakshi Jain (Flosum):** Growth Team Lead; analyzes blog performance and manages paid campaigns.](https://fathom.video/share/JgEvFPGox2oXU64H_ntRrdjPHBSidyc8?tab=summary&timestamp=357.0)
  - [**Beau Beamon (Flosum):** Director of Marketing Ops; ensures infrastructure is tagged and tracks data correctly.](https://fathom.video/share/JgEvFPGox2oXU64H_ntRrdjPHBSidyc8?tab=summary&timestamp=398.0)
  - [**Matt (Flosum):** VP of Marketing; provides overall strategic direction.](https://fathom.video/share/JgEvFPGox2oXU64H_ntRrdjPHBSidyc8?tab=summary&timestamp=571.0)

### Content Strategy & Messaging

  - [**Strategic Messaging Document:**](https://fathom.video/share/JgEvFPGox2oXU64H_ntRrdjPHBSidyc8?tab=summary&timestamp=685.0)
      - [Status: Stalled pending leadership review.](https://fathom.video/share/JgEvFPGox2oXU64H_ntRrdjPHBSidyc8?tab=summary&timestamp=685.0)
      - [Impact: Delays content alignment, as many initiatives depend on it.](https://fathom.video/share/JgEvFPGox2oXU64H_ntRrdjPHBSidyc8?tab=summary&timestamp=685.0)
  - [**New Product Messaging:**](https://fathom.video/share/JgEvFPGox2oXU64H_ntRrdjPHBSidyc8?tab=summary&timestamp=758.0)
      - [Goal: Build topical authority pre-launch by integrating new product language into blogs.](https://fathom.video/share/JgEvFPGox2oXU64H_ntRrdjPHBSidyc8?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)
      - [Process: Sydnie Mulcahy (Flosum) will share enablement decks after an internal session next week.](https://fathom.video/share/JgEvFPGox2oXU64H_ntRrdjPHBSidyc8?tab=summary&timestamp=945.0)
      - [Action: Sydnie Mulcahy (Flosum) made minor edits to recent blogs to begin the messaging shift.](https://fathom.video/share/JgEvFPGox2oXU64H_ntRrdjPHBSidyc8?tab=summary&timestamp=799.0)
  - [**ABM Content:**](https://fathom.video/share/JgEvFPGox2oXU64H_ntRrdjPHBSidyc8?tab=summary&timestamp=969.0)
      - [Action: Saakshi Jain (Flosum) will provide a list of blogs for PPC-optimized updates.](https://fathom.video/share/JgEvFPGox2oXU64H_ntRrdjPHBSidyc8?tab=summary&timestamp=969.0)
      - [Process: Create shorter, non-indexed versions of long-form blogs for paid campaigns.](https://fathom.video/share/JgEvFPGox2oXU64H_ntRrdjPHBSidyc8?tab=summary&timestamp=984.0)

### Logistics & Cadence

  - [**Meeting Time:**](https://fathom.video/share/JgEvFPGox2oXU64H_ntRrdjPHBSidyc8?tab=summary&timestamp=1095.0)
      - [Proposal: Shift from 7:30 AM PT to 8:00 AM PT.](https://fathom.video/share/JgEvFPGox2oXU64H_ntRrdjPHBSidyc8?tab=summary&timestamp=1095.0)
      - [Rationale: Better accommodates US team schedules.](https://fathom.video/share/JgEvFPGox2oXU64H_ntRrdjPHBSidyc8?tab=summary&timestamp=1095.0)
      - [Confirmation: Pending with Saakshi Jain (Flosum) and Will (GrowthX).](https://fathom.video/share/JgEvFPGox2oXU64H_ntRrdjPHBSidyc8?tab=summary&timestamp=1095.0)
  - [**Analytics Deep Dive:**](https://fathom.video/share/JgEvFPGox2oXU64H_ntRrdjPHBSidyc8?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
      - [Rescheduled: Moved to next week to allow for the team transition.](https://fathom.video/share/JgEvFPGox2oXU64H_ntRrdjPHBSidyc8?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Jessalynn Jones (GrowthX):**](https://fathom.video/share/JgEvFPGox2oXU64H_ntRrdjPHBSidyc8?tab=summary&timestamp=685.0)
      - [Follow up with Matt (Flosum) on the trust webinar draft.](https://fathom.video/share/JgEvFPGox2oXU64H_ntRrdjPHBSidyc8?tab=summary&timestamp=685.0)
  - [**Sydnie Mulcahy (Flosum):**](https://fathom.video/share/JgEvFPGox2oXU64H_ntRrdjPHBSidyc8?tab=summary&timestamp=942.0)
      - [Share new product enablement decks by end of next week.](https://fathom.video/share/JgEvFPGox2oXU64H_ntRrdjPHBSidyc8?tab=summary&timestamp=945.0)
  - [**Saakshi Jain (Flosum):**](https://fathom.video/share/JgEvFPGox2oXU64H_ntRrdjPHBSidyc8?tab=summary&timestamp=969.0)
      - [Provide list of blogs for ABM updates via Slack.](https://fathom.video/share/JgEvFPGox2oXU64H_ntRrdjPHBSidyc8?tab=summary&timestamp=969.0)
  - [**Katya Luscomb (GrowthX):**](https://fathom.video/share/JgEvFPGox2oXU64H_ntRrdjPHBSidyc8?tab=summary&timestamp=1095.0)
      - [Confirm 8:00 AM PT meeting time with Saakshi Jain (Flosum) and Will (GrowthX).](https://fathom.video/share/JgEvFPGox2oXU64H_ntRrdjPHBSidyc8?tab=summary&timestamp=1095.0)
